Finals-Games per Set: 3/5 Games for Grand Finals,3/5 Games for Winners Finals,3/5 Games for Losers Finals
Rules-Chara Change: Winner must keep character. Loser may switch.
Rules-Glitches: Any glitches that can cause the match to be completely unplayable (e.g. by causing a softlock or a game freeze) are banned. A player who triggers such a glitch has to forfeit the current game.
Rules-Notes:
Chen-Mao players must be aware of the desync issues she can cause if she is selected second on character select screen, and are responsible for resetting the game themselves to avoid this. As such, any would-be Chen-Mao players must be player 1 and manage resetting the game when necessary. 
- To be player 1 on Fightcade, you must be the one to challenge your opponent.
- Any desyncs caused by Chen-Mao will grant the game to their opponent.
- If a player forgets to reset the game upon a loss and picks Chen-Mao for the next match, the game must be reset before the match starts (FIGHT! appears on screen). Resetting the emulator once the match has started will grant the game to the Chen-Mao player's opponent.

- These rules do not apply in case of a Chen-Mao mirror.

Nanami is banned to avoid desyncs.

Info-Software Needed: Pending further tests for desyncs, we might be using one of the boss hacks on Fightcade. For now, assume it's on the vanilla ROM.

Rules-Notes:
Players have 20 minutes to play and restart the game as many times as they want. After 20 minutes pass, they can't restart anymore and have to play through completion or until they lose all their lives. Their score for the last run is then submitted to leaderboard.

Players may choose to stop playing during the first 20 minutes if they manage to get a clear.

As long as the Black Label version is respected, players can choose to play the game on whichever platform they want (arcade PCB, Xbox 360, PS4, Switch and emulation). Just be sure to have the means to share the screen through VDO.Ninja and Discord.
Info-Software Needed: Every player must share their game screen through VDO.Ninja (https://vdo.ninja/) AND Discord.

Rules-Chara Change: Winner must keep character. Loser may switch.
Rules-Notes:
Stage selection is random except by mutual agreement between players.

Loser of a match may either choose a stage or pick a different character for the next match. Winner must stay with the character they previously picked.

Draw Matches are not counted. In the event of a Draw, the Match must be replayed in the same conditions - same characters and same stage.

During Grand Finals, if the Player in the Loser's bracket wins, it sends the Player in Winners Bracket to Losers, triggering a "Reset". This Reset Match is considered a new Match for all intents and purposes, including character choice lock and stage randomization.
